coverage_notes: Covers reconnect, multi-selection focus, citation/action ordering, parameter update ordering, and local-vs-global advisory boundaries.
Requires confirmation and patch/action shape review before any sample is treated as training-ready.
Covers default Tab, ambiguous manual-only, empty candidates, cooldown recovery, mixed history, naming, and topology completion.
Manual-only and no-legal-candidate samples remain boundary evidence, not writeback permission.
Covers official docs answers, evidence gaps, source conflicts, attachments, FAQ supplement, and navigation questions.
Citation alignment and evidence-gap behavior must be reviewed before distillation use.

evidence: golden_response seed manifest covers all three v1 tasks with three samples per task
teacher_capture manifest covers all three v1 tasks with three audited candidate records per task
holdout split covers all three v1 tasks with three samples per task
holdout split lists both current training conversion manifests under excluded_training_conversion_manifests
training/datasets/copilot-training-review-record-v0.json keeps planned review batches at pending_review
no concrete reviewer, timestamp, per-sample dimension results, or leakage decision is recorded in this preflight review
this preflight review does not mark any sample or batch as reviewed_pass
preflight runbook defines raw_student_probe before repair_boundary_probe
raw_student_probe uses the full holdout candidate manifest with --validate-task and 300 second sample timeout
repair_boundary_probe is explicitly postprocess comparison and not raw promotion evidence
generated candidate responses, provider raw dump, JSONL, model weights, checkpoints, adapter binaries, and downloaded model cache remain disallowed committed artifacts
planned local outputs stay under tmp/radishmind-core-v1-preflight/

required_before_requesting_operator_run: Choose an existing local model directory; the wrapper must use local files only and must not download model artifacts.
Confirm the operator accepts local CPU/GPU load and 300 second per-sample timeout.
Do not generate training JSONL before human sample review has concrete reviewer, timestamp, per-dimension results, and leakage decision.
blocked_next_steps: marking teacher_capture seed samples as reviewed_pass
marking repaired or builder output as raw student promotion
next_review_action: After a local model directory is selected, request the operator to run raw_student_probe exactly once, then inspect tmp summary, candidate response, prompt, and offline eval artifacts before deciding whether to run repaired comparison.
